steps.title: Identify the subject number requirement
steps.content: The verb affect is plural, so the subject must be plural. We're discussing multiple snow grains, not a single one.

steps.title: Match the number requirement
steps.content:
Grains' (plural possessive) with properties (plural noun) creates the required plural subject. The other choices use singular forms (A: grain's; C: property's) or lack possessive marking (D).

That matches choice B — B is correct.
